title: Castaways of Endor
content:

'''Castaways of Endor''' is an article on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']] that details life on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], especially the flora and fauna from the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] television show. [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Robin Pronovost]] co-wrote the article with illustrations provided by Pronovost.

The ''Ewoks'' cartoon was a favorite of both Wallace and Pronovost growing up. Beginning in [[2001]], the pair began collaborating on the article and drew inspiration from the ongoing feature ''The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life'' in the magazine ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]''.<ref name="danwallace blog 120">{{Blog|danwallace|120|'Castaways of Endor,' New Article on StarWars.com}}</ref> According to Wallace, the article was unsuccessfully pitched for ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''. It was repackaged and pitched for ''Star Wars Gamer'' with roleplaying details, but that magazine's cancellation left the article unpublished. Another ''Insider'' pitch was attempted before [[StarWars.com]] purchased it as a Hyperspace exclusive.<ref name="Castaways of Endor thread">{{JCFCite|url=threads/29530570|board=Literature|thread=Castaways of Endor sees the light of day|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20190411164238/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/castaways-of-endor-sees-the-light-of-day.29530570}}</ref>
